---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability for the probe, the model, or the console
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem**
What is missing or hard to do today?

**Proposed solution**
What would the new capability look like? Sketch the API or UI.

**Layer**
- [ ] Firmware
- [ ] Inference / training
- [ ] API
- [ ] Web console
- [ ] Documentation

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches and why they were ruled out.

**Paper-impact note**
If this affects a metric reported in the paper, note which section.
